Business banking /
Industry expertise /
Manufacturing

Manufacturing industry banking services

Financial solutions designed for manufacturers

Whether you’re running a large-scale production line or managing a supply chain, U.S. Bank offers solutions to support the complete operating cycle.

  • Get flexible financing for essential equipment.

  • Seamlessly manage payments, capital and cash flow.

Make an appointment Call us

U.S. Bank is dedicated to helping your manufacturing business thrive.

Confidently manage your cash flow.

Whether you’re pursuing expansion, facing supply chain issues or navigating seasonality in demand, U.S. Bank offers funding and guidance to support you through it all.

Transform your business payments.

Streamline your payment operations with our trusted digital invoicing solutions and Payment Services. Easily send and receive funds while minimizing fraud risk and improving cash flow efficiency.

Drive profitability and create business opportunities.

With integrations into many popular Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems, our CenPOS payment gateway is tailored to the needs of manufacturers.

Key products for manufacturing firms and small businesses

Manufacturing equipment financing

Our financing solutions for manufacturing equipment offer competitive rates, flexible terms and generally quick credit decisions. We offer a simple one-page application for financing amounts up to $750,000, with larger requests supported through a tailored underwriting process.

Learn more

Treasury Management

Our treasury management solutions help your team deliver maximum impact and efficiency.

Learn more

Business credit cards

Get more purchasing power for your manufacturing business. With a business credit card from U.S. Bank, enjoy cash back and bonus points on eligible purchases.

Learn more

Connect with industry-leading bankers.

Our dedicated bankers are readily available to offer support and financial guidance. We’ll help you work toward your goals, overcome roadblocks and keep business running smoothly.

Make an appointment

U.S. Bank is a very important partner for our company. They also understand our growth plans and are consulting with us on how we can grow our manufacturing footprint in other states.

Rolando Pozos, owner of Amapola Deli & Market, U.S. Bank food manufacturer client
View transcript

SinglePoint® Essentials: Your one-stop tool for managing cash flow and business payments.

SinglePoint® Essentials is a scalable online banking platform for handling eCheck, wire, ACH, and real-time payments. It also allows multiple users to manage finances collaboratively.

Learn more

Frequently asked questions

We’ll work with you to find a financing solution that is best for your business. Financing options may include up to 125% financing when including additional costs such as installation, tax and freight. You can finance multiple pieces of equipment on one contract with financing amounts up to $2.5 million.

Consider the benefits of digitizing your business, including automating check payments and implementing remote deposit capture. Moving away from paper-based payments, including both payables and receivables, is a strategic decision that turns an operations expense into a business credit.

Make an appointment

Schedule a virtual or in-person meeting with a business banker.

Request a call

Fill in details about your banking needs and a representative will call you.

Call us

Call 800-673-3555 to talk with a representative right away.

Disclosures

U.S. Bank Payment Solutions are powered by Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank NA, and may have different privacy and security policies than U.S. Bank. For additional details, refer to the information found on the U.S. Bank Payment Solutions Privacy & Terms of Service page.

U.S. Bank and SinglePoint are registered trademarks of U.S. Bank National Association.

General conditions and fees may apply. See a business banker for details.

Services may be subject to credit approval. Eligibility requirements, restrictions and fees may apply. See a business banker for details.

Using these programs requires a merchant processing account. See a business banker for details.

Credit products offered by U.S. Bank National Association and are subject to normal credit approval and program guidelines. Some restrictions and fees may apply.

Deposit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC.
